references.reason: The intake table makes four evidence layers visible before any treatment decision.
Observed signs remain separate from interpretation and diagnosis.
The ledger preserves each patient's own wording without clinical overwrite.
Tewi's paw-stamped cards make misleading symptoms visually quarantineable.
The triage mechanic separates trace layers and pauses safely on loss.
The journal records competence as separation, consent, and bounded uncertainty.
The consent desk keeps the closed Lens case visible throughout both refusals.
A complete refusal record leaves its reason blank without treating the chart as incomplete.
The closed case makes non-action after refusal visually explicit.
The optional return card expires without creating medical or relationship debt.
The consent branch records limited scope and continued permission to withdraw.
The refusal branch proves that care and route access continue without penalty.
One table keeps Kosuzu's ordinary next task and Kaguya's cosmic chart simultaneously visible.
The complete chart preserves a real cosmic problem instead of reducing it to spectacle.
Return slips make the small injury matter through the human work immediately following care.
The sealed packet opens only within Kosuzu's stated consent and contains no real-world treatment instructions.
The planning board keeps consent, next use, and cosmic evidence visible without equating scale with worth.
The journal distinguishes equal attention from identical duration or procedure.
The boundary desk keeps the sealed sample, withdrawn form, and accepted blank result visible during Eirin's anger.
A round container and intact high-contrast seal distinguish the unopened sample without depicting an actionable experiment procedure.
The initially uncrossed form receives a thick diagonal X only after withdrawal, making the player's boundary action irreversible and readable in one bit.
A titled result sheet with surrounding ruled fields and one deliberately blank central result cell reads as accepted uncertainty rather than missing art.
The journal preserves Eirin's anger, the withdrawn offer, and continuation without route lockout.
